kube14-05-2023 17:52

Tags: #kubectx #kubectl 


---
**kubectx** is a tool to switch between contexts (clusters) on kubectl faster.
https://github.com/ahmetb/kubectx

## Linux/MacOS

Requires [[kubectl krew]] to be installed first

Install kubectx
```Bash
sudo git clone https://github.com/ahmetb/kubectx /opt/kubectx
sudo ln -s /opt/kubectx/kubectx /usr/local/bin/kubectx
sudo ln -s /opt/kubectx/kubens /usr/local/bin/kubens
```

## Windows

```Bash
choco install kubens kubectx
```
Installs kubectx and kubens

## Usage

view kubeconfigs
```bash
kubectx
```

Select kubeconfig
```Bash
kubectx <name>
```

Example .kube/config file
```Bash
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: 
    server: https://kubernetes.docker.internal:6443
  name: docker-desktop
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: 
    server: https://vm-k3s-srv1:6443
  name: vm-k3s-srv1

contexts:
- context:
    cluster: docker-desktop
    user: docker-desktop
  name: docker-desktop
- context:
    cluster: vm-k3s-srv1
    user: vm-k3s-srv1
  name: vm-k3s-srv1

users:
- name: docker-desktop
  user:
    client-certificate-data: 
    client-key-data: 
- name: vm-k3s-srv1
  user:
    client-certificate-data: 
    client-key-data: 
```

---
